[{"id":1,"q":"What is plant-based protein?","a":"Plant protein is protein sourced from plants like pea, rice, nuts, seeds, grains, pulses & completely eliminates dairy, egg, meat sources. These sources are rich in essential amino acids, making them an excellent substitute for animal-based proteins. Plant-based proteins are typically lower in fat & cholesterol and have been linked to a range of health benefits, including improved heart health & manages inflammation. They are popular among vegetarians, vegans, and those looking to reduce their meat intake."},{"id":2,"q":"What are the benefits of plant-based organic protein powder?","a":"Plant-based protein sources in Strength 25G Plant Protein Powder for post-workout recovery, energy & stamina such as Pea & Rice offer a full range of amino acids that can enhance muscle strength & digestion, while also increasing muscle mass, supports metabolism and improving immunity. These plant-based proteins are a great alternative to traditional animal-based protein sources."},{"id":3,"q":"What makes it an effective protein powder?","a":"PLIX Strength 25G is effective because it combines 25g of complete plant protein with BCAAs, digestive enzymes, and antioxidants to support muscle growth, improve recovery, and aid digestion. All in a, lactose-free and gluten-free formula."},{"id":4,"q":"Is It complete plant protein?","a":"Yes, Strength 25G Plant Protein Powder for post-workout recovery, energy & stamina a complete plant protein. This delicious Plix protein powder is made using plant sources instant of animal protein like whey or casein. This plant protein formula helps in preventing bloating or other digestive discomforts after drinking this protein drink."},{"id":5,"q":"What is the difference between plant protein & whey protein?","a":"Plant protein & whey protein differ in their source and composition. Plant protein in Strength Plant Protein Powder for post-workout recovery, energy & stamina is derived from plants such as peas, rice, or soy, while whey protein is extracted from milk. Plant protein is typically lower in calories, fat, & lactose, making it a better option for those with dietary restrictions. Whey protein is known for its rapid absorption by the body; but the downside is that it can cause digestion problems in your body, particularly if you are lactose intolerant."},{"id":6,"q":"Will Super Strength Plant Protein Powder improve post-workout recovery?","a":"Yes, Strength Plant Protein Powder for post-workout recovery, energy & stamina. Plix protein powder supports muscle tissue recovery as well as complete daily protein requirement. Plix Protein aids in post-workout recovery by providing a range of benefits that support muscle repair."},{"id":7,"q":"Will I face bloating after drinking Super Strength Plant Protein Powder?","a":"No! Strength Plant Protein Powder is specially designed for post-workout recovery and energy. Its complete plant protein blend makes it a nutritious and easy-to-digest option. Plus, it contains natural digestive enzymes like Papain and Bromelain, which help break down proteins and support smooth digestion."},{"id":8,"q":"What sets Plix Super Strength Plant Protein Powder apart from other brands?","a":"Most plant protein supplements are not so palatable in taste; however, Strength Plant Protein Powder for post-workout recovery, energy & stamina tastes delicious! It is available in Raw chocolate, Cafe Mocha, Mango, Vanilla Banana flavours. Plix protein is a combination of brown rice & pea protein; it is a clean, plant-based form of packing in all the 9 essential amino acids(complete amino acid profile) including BCAA’s, which act as building blocks for muscle building & wear + tear! "},{"id":9,"q":"Does Strength 25G contain enzymes like Papain?","a":"Yes! To ease the breaking down of plant protein powder & to aid the overall digestion process in the body, we’ve combined plant-based proteolytic enzymes – Papain & Bromalin in Strength 25G Plant Protein Powder for post-workout recovery, energy & stamina. This vegan protein is easily digestible & light on the stomach. Pea protein is highly bioavailable & is quickly assimilated by the body for protein synthesis."},{"id":10,"q":"What is the best way to consume protein?","a":"The best way to consume protein is by including it in your daily routine as per your fitness and lifestyle needs. Strength Plant Protein Powder can be enjoyed post-workout for faster recovery and sustained energy. Simply mix one scoop with 300–350 ml of water, plant-based milk, or your favorite smoothie for a delicious, easy-to-digest protein boost. "}]

node.review: I was tired of other protein powders casuing indegestion and gas and almost gave up searching for a solution. Luckily, my friend recommended me to try the Plix Strength. It's a plant based protein powder and is so easy on the stomach!! The best part is that it is gluten free. My digestion has improved drastically. I no longer experience any gas or indegestion which blows my mind. If you face a similar problem with other protein powders, I would highly recommend trying this one!!

node.review: I have always hated the taste of protein powders but this one's taste is beyond believable! I've tried the Vanilla and Chocolate flavours till now. I'd have to say Chocolate tastes much better. Despite being a plant based protein powder, the results as good, if not better than other types of protein powders. My gym trainer is extremely impressed with my recent progress in the gym and is shocked by how quick my muscle recovery time is now. He has started using the Plix Strength 25G Plant Protein Powder, he has also recommended it to all his clients and says they are very happy with how easy it is on the stomach.

node.review: Have now been using PLIX for over a year now. Easy and light on the gut. Very versatile too.
